programme.desc: After being told that boy bands always split up after the third album, the guys compete to find solo “breakout” gigs before being left behind.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The guys get a dose of reality when Gustavo tells them they have to go to school while they live in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Get your chopsticks ready. The good times roll when the boys work in a sushi factory to earn the money to buy the living room furniture back after an anniversary present for their parents go awry.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After learning that Gustavo is hosting a party at the studio that the boys are not invited to, they guys decide to host their own party at the Palm Woods.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Mr. Nichols boss calls off their dinner plans because of a last minute babysitter cancellation, Josh volunteers his and Drake's services.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 317
programme.desc: Babe has to make a choice when multiple guys from her past want to date her. Meanwhile, Trip and Hudson have to buy a famous watch for Dub.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When the parents leave town for the weekend, Drake and Josh's excitement is stunted when they learn that Grammy is coming to stay.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Hudson and Trip open a Snackpot - a vending machine that dispenses snacks at random- on the subway, which Dub quickly becomes obsessed with.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Dub gets tickets to a VIP performance of the hottest musical of all time - Flavor City.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After Drake and Josh accidentally kill Megan's pet hamster, they ready themselves for her revenge that could come anywhere, anytime.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 119
programme.desc: Kenzie invites an uninterested Babe to her coding club, but Babe swoons when she meets coding cutie Scott. An aging app predicts Trip will go bald and Dub helps him avoid his fate.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Gustavo thinks its time to build some hype around Big Time Rush and sets up an important interview with famous blogger, Deke. Deke has been known to make or break a career so the guys must get this right.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After Mindy tells Josh she loves him, Josh turns to the only logical place for advice: Drake.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: A company asks Game Shakers to build a game based on a robot they created. The robot develops a bro-bot crush on Hudson and malfunctions.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 117
programme.desc: When a rival rapper releases a track about Double G, the Game Shakers convince Dub to respond. The traack enrages the rapper and he comes to confront Double G.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Now that Josh is no longer dating Mindy he wants to play the field and challenges Drake to a bet to see who can score more dates.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: In an attempt to get to know each other better and increase productivity, Kenzie organizes a team building retreat in Game Shakers.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: When Drake is falsely accused of playing a practical joke on one of his teachers and threatened with suspension, he and Josh plead their case before the Honor Council.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Babe and Kenzie get complaints from their neighbour, so they bake him a pie. After the pie sends the neighbour to hospital, Dub and Trip must clear the girls' names. (S1, ep 13)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Drake and Josh accidentally burn down their neighbor's tree house. Their parents force the boys to rebuild the tree house and Drake and Josh plan to do it quickly.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The boys return from tour and find Jo flirting with a hot new guy, new kids hanging out at the pool, and loads of schoolwork! With the second leg of their tour starting soon, will life in LA return to the way it was?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The guys have been having a little too much fun living in Hollywood and after getting charged again for breaking stuff at the Palm Woods and Gustavo has had enough and makes them get jobs!

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The guys accidentally destroy the tape of the new Big Time Rush episode they were supposed to give the network. Needing a replacement episode the guys decide to make a blooper show which Stephen Glickman and Ciara Bravo host.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The boys are tired of sharing a ride and get money to buy a car, but all goes bananas when Drake buys an orangutan named Bobo instead.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Drake's new girlfriend might be tougher than him. Josh trying to impress Mindy's parents might be even tougher. Will the boys prevail, or will girl power rule the day?

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The guys all chase the same girl, causing problems in the band for the first time.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: BTR is making a cameo on a popular kid’s TV show, but Carlos’ pursuit of the show’s teen star puts him and Kendall in the crosshairs of her evil stage mother. Logan & James battle Yo Gabba Gabba over their amazing snack table.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: It's Science Fair time and Josh is sure that this year, his is the project to beat. But when Mindy Crenshaw makes a surprise return, sparks fly in the most unexpected places.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Big Time Invasion: BTR has to stop the invasion of the British boy band! Concerned that Gustavo is spread too thin, the boys try to hire a top music manager. Unable to agree, the four split and a rift quickly escalates within the band.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Sky Whale - Part 1: Babe and Kenzie's school project, Sky Whale, becomes an accidental viral video game hit, until rap star Double G comes to collect his share of the profits.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Gustavo starts an all-girl pop group, sparking jealousy from the guys.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Coming to terms with how their world has changed, the guys decide to take control and with Gustavo plan their first big concert.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The boys return from their world tour and are now famous at the Palm Woods, but they just want to get settled and focus on girls. Griffin tries to bribe Carlos to pick his favorite song for the boys’ upcoming radio interview.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: The Game Shakers haven't been getting along. Dub recommends they see his office therapist: Snoop Dogg.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: After Trip solicits romantic advice from Babe for an alleged friend named Chuck, she comes to suspect that Trip has a crush on her, and tries her hardest to avoid an awkward work situation.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Griffin is pitching a line of BTR merchandise to the CEO of Selmart, but the boys hate the products. Taking matters into their own hands the guys crash the meeting and accidently get their music banned from Selmart stores.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop producer and hit maker DJ Mustard joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put MUSTARD ON EVERYTHING, suffer through a COLD SUMMER, and celebrate the greatest HEY MAKERS of all time.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 820
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling take the "Running Man Challenge," explore the fear known as "Crap-nophobia" and learn what it means to be "Saved To Death."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 24
programme.desc: On an all-new remix episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel, and Steelo swap places as Chanel teaches that CUTE KILLS, Steelo warns about DEATH CARTS and Rob shows how people get down with PPP

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop legend DJ Paul joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to get a little ZAP HAPPY, live the JUGG LIFE, and get energized by some BEATSPIRATION.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On a special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel get down with the bros as they view the world in BRO-MOTION, learn what it means to be BRO-PROOF, and study the special bro bond IN BRO WE TRUST.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 717
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning producer and DJ, Diplo, joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling save the day with "Peacekeepers," get crazy with "Mad Indecent Block Parties,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling spot some "Man Dolphins", hit some red "Bullseyes" and get wet in the category "Dammmmp Daniel."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through BLACK AND BLUE FRIDAY, GETTIN' UGLY with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some HUMAN DREIDELS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 809
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo fly solo as they learn how dangerous it is to be born with "Turtle Blood", get in shape with "Beast 90x" and learn the advantages to being 100% "Prank Proof".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo choke down some STREET MEAT, party with a few SLITER SISTERS and hit the stairs with some extreme SLINKIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 724
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper/producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's "Glide Or Die," get "Over Gassed," and announce to the world "I Love Sparks!"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 821
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, comedy icon Wanda Sykes joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to talk about what it means to have "Unpresidential Nipples," doling out "Momforcement," and the first-ever "Wandamania."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob, Stee-Lo and Chanel to talk about the " Legends Of Campfoo", going "Lights Out" and learn what it means to get "Party Rock'd".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Young M.A joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about people who have HOT SAUCE, the meaning of RED LYFE, and the joy of CASH BATHS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, motivational speaker Michael Crossland joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to teach us the CROSSLAND METHOD, show us what it means when your dog is CROSS-BRED, and visit the FIELD OF NIGHTMARES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 716
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling and Chanel try out some "Competitive Sleeping," experience the confusion of "Creature Shock" and go too hard on a "Sunday Doneday."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop star Vic Mensa joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to check out some close calls in STILL ALIVE, learn creative ways to SAVE MORE MONEY and get extra strange with A LOT GOING ON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, singer-songwriter Jessie J joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to learn how to DO IT LIKE A DUDE, hear some harsh truths in MOM-SPLAINING and watch the bodies slam in BANG BANG.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Music producer Clinton Sparks teaches Rob, Chanel, and Steelo how to make budget beats with SPARKS OF GENIUS, get cultured with some MASSHOLES, and cause some serious mom damage with MAMA TRAUMA.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip hop and R&B singer Ty Dolla $ign joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to check out some SIDE SHOWS, do a little NECK PREP, and find the hottest PORTA-PARTIES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 27
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, we celebrate the world of NASCAR, with a salute to PASS MASTERS, an introduction to NASCAR EXITS, and a look at what happens when people get PAVEMENTAL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo celebrate a RUSSIAN THANKSGIVING, feel the wrath of some TEENY MEANIES and plug in with VIRTUAL RETIREMENT.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 815
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Sterling, and Chanel to sweeten the sound of people's slams in "T-Pain Your Pain", talk about "Hard 180s"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 15
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy nominated singer-songwriter and actress Christina Milian joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to be amazed by some SUPERHUMANS, give some restaurants an F-RATING, and be terrorized by some FEATHER SHARKS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 828
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob shows Chanel and Sterling the animal mastery of "Beast Lords," the tragedy of having a "Craptastrophe" and the dangers of flying "Foot Bombs."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 818
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling see the secret skills it takes to be an "Undercover Badass," find a new way of "Gettin' Paid" and learn that some things are simply "Unforgivable."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 729
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by pop singer Zara Larsson to go "Beast Catching," shed some "Beyonce Tears," and sing along to the "Worstest Love Of All."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo attend some BRO BURIALS, hang with a crew of LIL' TRUNKIES and teach us a new trend called SPEED BUMPING.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Stranger Things actor Gaten Matarazzo joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for a terrifying special episode as they witness PURE TERROR, get a TASTE OF THE GRAVE and try to avoid the DEMOGORGONS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 28
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by country musician Wheeler Walker, Jr. to discuss his BANNED MATES, analyze grooming techniques in MUFF MAINTENANCE, and explore the embarrassment of PREMATURE RELEASES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo take a vacation to LAKE PAINATONKA, catch the quick hands in GRABBIES and watch some unsuspecting people get EFFED FROM BEHIND.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 726
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling welcome model Ireland Baldwin to celebrate some "Bald Wins," run afoul of some "Trash Horses" and learn the difficulties of having "Outside Deficit Disorder."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 14
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness it's Ladies Night! Rob, Steelo, and Chanel celebrate incredible women with SUPER SHE-ROES, pay homage to mothers in MOMMIN' AIN'T EASY, and explore the fabled women's restroom in LEGENDS OF THE STALL.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by BMX legend Jamie Bestwick to experience some serious VERT HURT, keep kids in their place with YOUTH SLAYERS and get over-caffeinated with ROTHROCKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness rapper 21 Savage joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to go into SAVAGE MODE, update the dictionary with WORD BIRTHERS and prove you never know when a random object ISSA WEAPON.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 26
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, radio and TV star Charlemagne Tha God joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to PUT SOME RESPECK ON MY NAME, call out the DONKEYS OF THE DAY and realize some people are just DILDO DUMB.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Sterling, and Chanel take a much needed "Karate Break", try to figure out what's wrong with some highly "Defective Pets", and play a classic game of "Heads Or Tails?"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 720
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Jackass and Wildboyz star Chris Pontius joins Rob, Chanel, and Sterling get up close in some "All-Natural Weirdness," dance with some "Party Boys,"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: On the Season 9 Premiere of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo get CROPPED OUT, take a trip to their local HELL MART and enjoy some delicious PUMPKIN SPICE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 30
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some PARANORM-ISH ACTIVITY, do some ATTEMPTED MAN SHIT and meet some animals that are MILK READY.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 730
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, hip-hop duo Rae Sremmurd joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to celebrate the "Sremmlife," get hurt "Worse Than It Looks" and have somebody "Come Get Her"

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 725
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined all the way from the UK by YouTube's Sam Sadler to rock out to some "Pins and Needles," get "Scared Forever,".

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 21
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some QUALIFIED ROLLERS, marvel at people who use NO HANDS, and laugh at CRAPTICAL JOKERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 8
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo, and Chanel are joined by rapper G-Eazy to learn the DANGERS OF ALONE TIME, get a taste of the riches in THE ALMOST GOOD LIFE, and experience the heartbreak of being SERVED A CURVE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, it's Sterling's time to shine as Rob quizzes him with a "Steelo Vision Test," the gang gets some "Trill Advice" and do all they can to avoid "The Brim Reaper."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to throw down some JAMMIES, check out the TONGUE CAM and experience some water pain in the category GETTIN' LAKED.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Teyana Taylor joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to pay tribute to KID NAPPERS, and tell us about BIRTHDAY ASSASSINS, and what it's like to be in a LUST BUBBLE.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Steelo dive head first into some DEAD POOLS, go into CARROT SHOCK and learn a valuable life lesson that EVERYTHING FARTS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Grammy Award-winning duo The Chainsmokers join Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to cringe at some BITERS, ride STOLEN MATTRESSES and marvel at the magic of real-life TELEPORTERS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness S10 Ep. 16
programme.desc: On an all-new special episode of Ridiculousness, dedicated to the smart people who make our world a better place, Rob, Steelo and Chanel take a look at some lesser-known NERDACHIEVEMENTS, the dark side of science, with TRIAL AND TERROR

programme.title: Ridiculousness S7 Ep. 721
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling have NASCAR's Chase Elliott talk about "Hall Of Fame Dads," suffer a "Victory Lapse," and get a helping hand from some "Personal Pit Crews."

programme.title: Ridiculousness S8 Ep. 826
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Chanel and Sterling look for some "Everyday Peens", watch some videos get "Dog Bombed" and check out some people who have serious "Motor Skills".

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: Toilet Paper: Mrs. Dreibel gives the boys detention for making a phallus out of clay in art class. Angry, they take revenge by toilet papering her house. Officer Barbrady is on their trail. (S7, E03)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: Cancelled: The boys get a sense of deja vu as Cartman again has an anal probe, but they soon realise they're actually stuck in some kind of re-run - Earth is just a reality show for aliens! (S7, E01)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 705
programme.desc: Fat Butt and Pancake Head: When Cartman wins a diversity event with his offensive hand puppet impersonation of Jennifer Lopez, Kyle is enraged. Soon the real J-Lo turns up, mightily peeved! (S7, E05)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Lil' Crime Stoppers: Stan, Kyle, Cartman and Kenny decide to play detective; they go around the town solving minor "crimes" for a dollar. It's not long before they're busting meth labs! (S7, E06)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 707
programme.desc: Red Man's Greed: When the entire town is bought out by a Native American casino, the boys come up with a plan to get their homes back - but is more gambling really the solution? (S7, E07)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 708
programme.desc: South Park is Gay! The TV show Queer Eye For The Straight Guy is sweeping the nation and the men of South Park are embracing metrosexuality, but what evil plan are the hosts plotting? (S7, E08)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 709
programme.desc: Christian Hard Rock: The boys form a band called Moop, but disagree on what direction they should take. Cartman leaves the band and bets them he will have a platinum record first! (S7, E09)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 711
programme.desc: Casa Bonita: Cartman is overjoyed at going to a Mexican restaurant for Kyle's birthday but is crushed when he finds out Butters is invited instead. He'll have to make Butters "disappear". (S7, E11)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 712
programme.desc: All About The Mormons: A new family moves to South Park and their son Gary is an unusually perfect Mormon - this angers the boys no end! Will Stan beat him up or go for a family dinner?! (S7, E12)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 713
programme.desc: Butt Out: When the boys' smoking leads to a nasty incident, it's the cigarettes that are blamed rather than them. Cue the glutinous Rob Reiner to arrive in town with his anti-smoking lobby! (S7, E13)

programme.title: South Park S7 Ep. 714
programme.desc: Raisins: When Wendy breaks up with Stan he takes it hard. The boys decide to take him to the restaurant Raisins, where all of the employees are preteen girls who enjoy wearing heavy make-up. (S7, E14)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The children of South Park are attracted to "Mr. Jefferson," the new neighbor in town, and Cartman goes out of his way to get "Mr. Jefferson" to love him best.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A PETA protest against the use of a cow as South Park Elementary's mascot forces the student body to choose a new one.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In order to save South Park, Stan and Kyle have to find a way to destroy the ever-expanding Wall-Mart superstore while keeping Cartman from stabbing them in the back.

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Good Times With Weapons: After buying martial arts weapons at a local flea market, the boys are transformed into anime Japanese Warriors, with dire consequences for poor Professor Chaos. (S8, E01)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Up The Down Steroid: Jimmy is due to take part in the Special Olympics but what dodgy substance is he talked into taking? Cartman fakes being disabled so he can enter and win a $1,000. (S8, E02)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: The Passion of the Jew: After seeing 'The Passion of the Christ' a zealous Cartman taunts Kyle. When Stan and Kenny see it, they hate it and harass a crazed Mel Gibson for their money back! (S8, E03)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 805
programme.desc: You Got F'd in the A: The boys get 'served' by some kids from the O.C. so now 'it's on!'. Stan puts together a dance troupe who must compete in the dance-off. Will Randy's moves save them? (S8, E04)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 806
programme.desc: Goobacks: South Park is swamped by workers from the future, who take all the jobs for less pay. The men of South Park go to unusual lengths to stop them. "Dey turk err jurbs!" (S8, E07)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 810
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 811
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 812
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 813
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park S8 Ep. 814
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When hippie drum circles start popping up in people's attics and backyards the citizens of South Park have no choice but to turn to Eric Cartman for help.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The boys set up a talent agency and pool all their resources and impress their first client only to have another agency steal him away.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: After the sudden on-set of the disease Gingervitis, Cartman rallies all other ginger kids to rise up and assume their role as the master race.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The boys try to rescue their new friend Willzyx, a talking space whale, from the Denver Sea Park, and with the help of MASA (Mexican Aeronautica y Spacia Administracion) get him home to the moon for $200.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Stan is embarrassed when his dad gets pulled over for drunk driving. Randy believes that only one thing can save him from his 'disease,' a bleeding statue of the Virgin Mary in the next town.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 6

programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.desc: Reggie meets Johns's friend Dan, who is recently divorced from an extraordinary, accomplished woman.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of a shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op.

programme.title: The Heart Wants
programme.desc: Amy helps Caleb with his son’s pony. Lou and Jessica start a new venture, while Katie tries a risky new hobby.

programme.title: A Piece Apart
programme.desc: Amy must deal with Lyndy’s sudden fear of horses. Logan blames himself for Miley’s accident.

programme.title: How to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: Amy and Jack train Blue for a competition. Lisa deals with a difficult loss. Katie secretly buys a dirt bike.

programme.title: Heat of the Moment
programme.desc: Amy has a run in with an old friend that leads to heartache. Jack and Lisa prove they can be adventurous.

programme.title: Unknown Caller
programme.desc: Lou’s forced to face the reason for her insomnia. Jack wins over a prickly dude ranch guest.

programme.title: Harmony
programme.desc: Amy helps a vaulting team ahead of a big competition. Caleb struggles with a tough decision about Carson.

programme.title: Fear is a Liar
programme.desc: Amy and Nathan retrain his horse. Jessica has to heal a rift with Jack.

programme.title: Just the Beginning
programme.desc: An accident puts Shane’s wedding in jeopardy. Heartland Beef faces an uncertain future.

programme.title: There and Back Again
programme.desc: Amy returns from Europe and struggles to adjust to life at Heartland and her relationship with Ty.

programme.title: The Big Red Wall
programme.desc: After Jack makes a major announcement, Lou plans a party and forces Jack into an awkward reunion.

programme.title: Severed Ties
programme.desc: Amy’s attempts to reunite with Georgie are continually thwarted by the arrival of lavish gifts from afar.

programme.title: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: A surprise visitor arrives at Heartland and makes a declaration that has serious consequences for Amy.

programme.title: Endings and Beginnings
programme.desc: Amy struggles to turn a pair of horses into a team, and is forced to go head-to-head with a rival trainer.

programme.title: Steal Away
programme.desc: When a client horse keeps escaping, Amy discovers the animal has unexpected abilities.

programme.title: Walk a Mile
programme.desc: Amy struggles to help a Hutterite family whose team of Percherons ran amok during a hayride.

programme.title: The Family Tree
programme.desc: A school project opens a door to Georgie’s past that could ultimately change her life at Heartland.

programme.title: The Pike River Cull
programme.desc: Jack and Amy help an old friend when a herd of wild horses faces the threat of being destroyed.

programme.title: The Heart of a River
programme.desc: With the fate of the wild horses hanging in the balance, Amy and Ty find themselves drawing closer.

programme.title: The Silent Partner
programme.desc: Amy finds herself in a difficult position when a client reveals that Peter turned down a lucrative job offer.

programme.title: Broken Heartland
programme.desc: When Amy is invited to do a horse clinic in Montana, she and Ty decide to take a road trip together.

programme.title: Cowgirls Don’t Cry
programme.desc: Tim opens a rodeo school, determined to help young people avoid injury while getting the training they need.

programme.title: Riders on the Storm
programme.desc: Amy and Ty help Scott’s nephew realize he is worthy of continuing his family tradition of relay racing.

programme.title: Eclipse of the Heart
programme.desc: Lou returns from Vancouver with an admission that threatens to change the Heartland family forever.

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: The family strives to support a devastated Georgie when Lou and Peter are forced to tell her distressing news.

programme.title: All I Need Is You
programme.desc: Lou spearheads preparations for the big day while Amy throws herself into gentling a rescue horse.

programme.title: Written in Stone
programme.desc: To give Amy and Ty the wedding they really want, Lou struggles to deal with a slew of last minute hurdles

programme.title: Brave New World
programme.desc: While a dangerous bear lurks near Heartland, Amy and Georgie rescue an injured horse from the woods

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: It's the anniversary of Pavel's death, but Geoff spurns the support of friends and family. Meanwhile, Shane loses money put aside for staff wages to a con artist.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tanya's sister chooses the restaurant for her wedding venue, and Mal's father-in-law is bent on making trouble.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A sudden realization from Bobby threatens to ruin the bar opening.

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's the night before Jojo and Dylan's wedding, and Shane has lost the rings. Meanwhile, Jojo's transgression finally bubbles up to the surface.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jojo is in shock after being sacked. Could this be the wake-up call she needs, or is it too late?

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Geoff must decide whether to stay at Raw or return to Australia to take over the family restaurant.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake is assigned to investigate the bludgeoning death of an elderly woman as quickly and quietly as possible while DCI James' wife Zoe goes into labor.

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Brian believes that someone else was in the room with him when he found his mother's body. Commander Blake is forced to take extreme action to find the truth and accept the repercussions. Will they find the abductor of DCI James' baby?

programme.title: The Commander S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Did Brian kill his own mother in an alcoholic haze? Who stole DCI James and Zoe's baby? Clare feels the heat of two high-profile cases with personal connections.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Patient and persistent, Deputy Chief Constable Stephen Blackton (David O'Hara) has earned his nickname, "Blackdog,” as he is called in to re-open the investigation of the Lionel Cripps shooting.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Graham Warner, the officer implicated in the Lionel Cripps shooting, is found dead in a park. Commander Blake continues to bury evidence of her relationship with James Lampton.

programme.title: The Commander S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Dutch DI Count Eric Van Hauten offers to help DCI Hedges with a new murder case. Commander Blake pledges to remain uninvolved, but will she be able to as the threat of more victims increases?

programme.title: The Commander S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Newly promoted, Commander Clare Blake (Amanda Burton) vows no cover-ups. When a previously convicted killer, James Lampton (Hugh Bonneville), gets released on parole, Blake's judgement is put to the test.

programme.title: The Commander S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: DCI Mike Hedges (Matthew Marsh) conceals evidence of his involvement in the police shooting of an unarmed civilian, Lionel Cripps.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake clashes with the drug squad and the preserved body of a two-year-old child found at an abandoned mental hospital remains a mystery. Blake is accused of having blood on her hands.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Commander Blake and DCI Doug James pursue two former patients as suspects in the case, Eric Thornton and John Littlewood. DCI James remains skeptical about the direction of the investigation.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When self-made millionaire Donald Griffith is found dead in his swimming pool, it seems like justice.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Commander Blake learns that Griffith's wife and mistresses all stand to benefit if his death was not a suicide.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After a popular priest is stabbed 29 times in his church, Commander Blake interrupts her holiday to investigate the murder.

programme.title: The Commander S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: A vicious attack puts a police officer in the hospital. Commander Blake learns that there's more to the story than DCI James has told her so far.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Commander Blake is in trouble. Her relationship with convicted killer James Lampton made the tabloids, and her supervisors are not amused.

programme.title: The Commander S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Commander Blake's terminally ill sister moves in with her while Blake deals with the dangerous computer hacker who has threatened to kill more patients every 24 hours.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Michael offers Geoff money to help him get Caroline back.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Leila suspects that Geoff is behind the terror campaign against her.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: The drama group faces a loss of interest.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Jim receives news that his sons were killed in an accident. Pat's trial comes to an end.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Vera is concerned about the risks of having Debbie inside Wentworth.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 33
programme.desc: Cops hunt for Geoff. Michael is arrested. Kerry Vincent arrives in Wentworth.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Sharon, angry that Kerry rejected her advances, stirs up the women.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Tensions rise as Kerry is accused of lagging. David manipulates the press.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Kerry demands to know who ruined her painting. Vera confronts Kerry.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Vera is suspended from her job. Sharon overhears Jock threatening Doreen.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 38
programme.desc: There's a lockdown in Wentworth following Sharon's death.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Prostitute Helen is admitted to Wentworth and turns out to be an old friend of Kerry's.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Judy accuses Jock of killing Sharon. Paul advises Doreen not to lend Lizzie money.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 41
programme.desc: Paul tells Kevin about Lizzie's family, and Judy introduces herself to Leanne.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 42
programme.desc: The women protest against the verdict of the inquest into Sharon's death.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 43
programme.desc: Noeline is caught stealing, and Kerry struggles with her addiction.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 44
programme.desc: Noeline has a disagreement with Doreen, obliging Judy to play the peacemaker.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 45
programme.desc: Paul does his best to help Kerry, and Meg sees a new flat and decides to take it.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 46
programme.desc: Bea tells the women not to rely on Noeline for any favours.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Judy tells Noeline that Margo is on to them, and Meg worries about Gail and her family.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 48
programme.desc: Paul speaks up for Gail at her committal hearing, but to little effect.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 49
programme.desc: Gail gets a frosty reception in the rec room, causing Judy to stand up for her.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 50
programme.desc: Lizzie notices that Doreen seems down, and Meg invites Paul and Tony for dinner.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Bea and the other women torment Gail in the laundry. Bea gets a letter from Ken.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 52
programme.desc: Judy goes on the run. Gail's kids are taken to a home.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 53
programme.desc: Erica reprimands Vera for exceeding her authority.

programme.title: Prisoner Cell Block H S2 Ep. 54
programme.desc: Judy is returned to Wentworth. Andrew does a shady deal with Bea.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: A man wrongfully convicted of murder takes Dr. Sloan hostage. Dr. Sloan hears his story and works to prove the man's innocence. Jesse works feverishly to rescue Mark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan shields George Karn from both Steve and Lt. Delaney while investigating his wife's murder.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Steve heads up the investigation when a serial cop killer is on the prowl, while inadvertently dating the killer.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: An exhausted Jesse, coming off a 48-hour stint in the hospital, witnesses a man die in the parking garage. Jesse returns with help only to find the man alive.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Amanda's cousin falls to his death when his motorcycle suddenly veers off the road. Amanda leads the investigation when it's discovered her cousin was drugged immediately before the accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan investigates a free health clinic after several homeless people turn up dead... with missing organs.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan tries to solve a friend's murder while Steve investigates the deceased's ex-wife and her identical twin sister.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A visiting surgeon must deal with his alcoholism after a fellow doctor is murdered during one of his blackouts.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: When a photoshop erroneously sends Dr. Sloan the wrong set of photographs, he becomes embroiled in the murder investigation of an escort girl. Meanwhile, Amanda's baby is about to come to term.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In an episode reminiscent of Hitchcock's Strangers on a Train, Dr. Sloan is drawn into a murder pact by a psychiatrist in need of money. The psychiatrist kills a woman pestering Dr. Sloan, expecting Mark to eliminate his problem.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jesse is attracted to a beautiful psychic, who also happens to be the prime suspect in a murder. Amanda copes with the trials of motherhood.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The daughter of one of Mark's friends writes a juicy tell-all expose of the most prominent public figures. Mark takes her in after a crazed stalker starts threatening her and her co-authors.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Mark investigates a perky morning television personality for the murder of a Howard Stern-like radio host.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S3 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan is the executor of his friend, Preston Michael's, estate after Michaels is found in the body of a shark.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A friendly-fire incident involving a veteran cop leaves Steve's friend dead, but the shooting only appears to be unintentional.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jesse and Dr. Sloan have contact with a contagious victim of a genetically altered smallpox strain.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A skater stages an attack on herself to win endorsements, then ices her accomplice---and frames her rival for the killing.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Soft music, candles, and a lifeless body dressed in lovely lingerie. These are the trademarks of 'The Casanova Killer,' a serial murderer who leaves only a stain of blood near the heart, and the sole of a foot marred by an 'X,' as forensic evidence.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and Steve investigate a private eye's murder in the not-very-pretty world of modeling.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A cardiologist and two business partners plot a deadly insurance scam.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: A terrorist bombing ignites an undercover investigation involving an ambitious cop.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan finds a murder victim among the trauma patients from a major bus accident.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: A senator's drug-addicted daughter is killed during an altercation with her father, but a senior aide covers up the incident as an overdose.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan and a headstrong attorney (Piper Laurie) investigate a drive-by shooting at a high school.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan's daughter (Stacy Van Dyke) escapes from her abusive husband---a trucker who turns up murdered.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Benny Ninja is back to educate the girls about posing, but one of the girls takes contorting her body a little too far.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The ladies are excited when Tyra reveals it’s time for makeovers. Hair is cut and tears are shed when the girls see their new looks for the first time.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The ladies practice their strut down a catwalk while wearing blindfolds and one girl shocks the judges when she decides to lift her dress while posing.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The contestants are thrilled when Paulina shows up to show them how to model unflattering clothing with style.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tyra surprises the remaining girls with a one-on-one photoshoot to teach each girl how to find their most flattering pose.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A look at never-before-seen footage of the cycle 11 contestants that includes the ladies improvising a rap in the hot tub, one girl revealing a hidden talent and a very candid chat between Tyra and the model wannabes.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The ladies pull a disappearing act for this week’s challenge.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 9
programme.desc: The ladies pack their bags and head overseas to their European destination.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The remaining five girls travel around town by boat for their go sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Paulina offers the girls advice on how to successfully model with a variety of items, including fish and toilet paper.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S11 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In the cycle 11 finale, the three finalists put their Top Model experience to the test when they shoot their final CoverGirl commercial & print ad.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: 32 young women arrive in LA, only to be whittled down to 13 finalists. After the field was narrowed down to 13 finalists, the girls were sent to their first photoshoot with Nigel Barker as their photographer.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Greeted by Miss J and a high school marching band, the girls were divided into teams and taught a runway walking routine based on timing and precision.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at Salon Sessions Studio by Tyra, Jay and Miss J for their dramatic makeovers.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: After being pulled over by what they thought was a traffic cop, the girls were taught the art of posing by vogue instructor Benny Ninja.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The girls met with the director of Elite Model Management Cathy Gould and Elite Model Claudia Mason, who taught them all about personal style and how to dress appropriately.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The girls were greeted by Twiggy and ANTM: Cycle Seven participant Melrose who taught them the importance of having a memorable name.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The girls met with actress Tia Mowry (The Game) who taught them how to portray different characters through voice and movement.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The girls were greeted at their house by Cycle 2 participant April, who gave them advice on how to be a correspondent and conduct a good interview.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 9
programme.desc: In this special recap episode, never-before-seen footage about the journey of the five remaining contestants is revealed, including a heated argument between two girls and a staged mock elimination by all the girls.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The girls met with the owner of Priscilla's Model Management, Priscilla Leighton Clark, and Australian model Jodhi Meares, who organized and booked several designers to meet them on Go Sees.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The girls met with Aboriginal Elder Uncle Max and his niece Calita, who taught them about the native Australian art of storytelling through dance.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: The three remaining models participated in a national photoshoot for Cover Girl's Lipshine Lip Color and a My Life as a CoverGirl commercial.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The 32 hopeful contestants arrived in a Pasadena hotel to start a runway challenge. Tyra selected the 13 finalists to enter the competition.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After the models battle it out to make the final cut, they are shocked to learn they will be going bald.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: After the girls are transformed with makeovers, they are put on ice at a photoshoot and face an ice princess back at the house.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Contestants must create a vegan dish using at least one ingredient from the mystery box set by vegan chef, Shannon Martinez. The top four dishes will cook off in tomorrow's immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Tonight's immunity challenge is fought in two rounds. In one round contestants must create a delicious dish using instant noodles. The top two from round one must make a nostalgic and comforting dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Josh Niland of The Fish Butchery breaks down a kingfish for each of the contestants to choose a cut to cook with. The contestant with the least impressive dish will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Each team must cook two dishes - one main and one dessert. Each contestant has 20 minutes to cook and they have just 45 seconds to hand over the dish to the next contestant in the relay.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Queen of chocolate and guest chef, Kirsten Tibballs reveals for today's pressure test, the contestants must create her wow-factor dessert, the meljito.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 33
programme.desc: The contestants lift the lids of their mystery box to find a photo sent by their loved ones. The contestants have 60 minutes to create a dish inspired by the memory in their family photo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish inspired by one of seven classic fairytales. With an open pantry and garden, the contestant with the best dish and the strongest concept will win immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Contestants must make a dish that has two different flavoured ice-creams that only work when they are eaten together. In round two, they must make a dish using one of five unusual flavour pairings.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Contestants cook a sweet or savoury style dish championing a citrus fruit of their choice. In round two, they use the same fruit but their dish must be in the opposite style.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Contestants discover they must create a dish inspired by chef Coskun Uysal's chicken rice pudding dessert. With this in mind, they must create their own dessert featuring a meat or protein.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Today's mystery box ingredients are decided entirely by the luck of the draw, with numbered lottery balls corresponding to 25 ingredients on display.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Each round in today's immunity challenge is worth 10 points and the contestant with the highest score at the end of round three will win immunity and be free from elimination on Sunday.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Who will make the MasterChef Australia top 10 in this Australia-themed pressure test?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 41
programme.desc: What's behind the wall?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 42
programme.desc: Benjamin Cooper, Executive Chef of Chin Chin Melbourne sets tonight's pressure test where contestants must recreate his jungle curry with rice and roti... without a recipe.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 43
programme.desc: Today's mystery box is all about smoke. Contestants can use any method of smoking as long as one element has been smoked with a smoking gun.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 44
programme.desc: The contestants are each presented with a pumpkin and have to cook dishes that feature the pumpkin in some way but Jock isn't impressed by Laura's chosen dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 45
programme.desc: Charlie Carrington of Melbourne restaurant, Atlas sets today's elimination challenge focusing on food from different countries. But will a big risk send one contestant home?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 46
programme.desc: A golden mystery box pushes the limits of the contestants' creativity. Those with the top four dishes will battle it out in tomorrow's immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 47
programme.desc: Every five minutes an ingredient that can be used in their cook is revealed to our contestants. They can start cooking at any time but only have access to the ingredients revealed up to that point.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 22
programme.desc: We've reached the top five on Australia Survivor: Heroes V Villains and it's crunch time. Desperate to win the Immunity Challenge, one castaway is looking strong, but can they hold out?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 23

programme.title: Australian Survivor S8 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Survivor's final Tribal Council has arrived. Who has the most complete resume and convincing case to be crowned the winnner of Heroes v Villains and take home the $500k prize that goes with it?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 2

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 3

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Titans wake up in high spirits, but nothing is quite as it seems when a new discovery raises suspicions.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The aftermath of Tribal Council hits home as a strong alliance is left untethered. Can an uncovered mystery give rise to a new power? Or will it cause more friction than ever before?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Both tribes deal with the aftermath of Tribal Council and a hurricane of a different sort comes to Survivor beach. Strategies are questioned. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 7

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 8

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: One castaway is left grovelling. Meanwhile, a mouth-watering reward is up for grabs, but can it be enough to strengthen tribe mate suspicions?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Is it worth taking a chance with a new alliance or should you trust someone again? Anything can happen at Tribal Councilâ€¦

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A second chance is up for grabs, and a Reward twist changes the power dynamics of the two dominant alliances. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: An alliance still reeling from an earlier vote leads to all-out war, but their plan to avenge their friend's blindside leads to outbursts and twists at Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Divided more than ever after the previous tribal, a feud continues to rampage through the tribe, tearing alliances apart. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Newly formed alliances are tested and an epic Reward is up for grabs that could change everything. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2

programme.desc: Debbie makes her feelings known to Tom K. The girls get sporty. Arg and Tom fallout. Charlie has a few words with Danni and Bobby confronts Danni.

programme.desc: Cara gives her little brother some sisterly advice. Mick is told a friend of his is hitting-on a Honey. Joey tries to find Arg a date and the Netball team is decided.

programme.desc: Kirk seeks some professional help. Mario bares all to win back Lucy’s affection. Arg goes on a blind date and Ricky makes a proposal.

programme.desc: Arg does a runner. Chloe plays her first DJ set and Mario and Tom K receive a shocking picture.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 8

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Gemma holds a singles night. Joey becomes a superhero. The boys become spies and Charlie drops a bombshell.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Arg changes his image. The girls have their first netball match. Gemma gets knocked back and Bobby tries his luck in lederhosen.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: There’s double trouble, the patter of tiny feet and lots of real-life drama, plus a birthday night to remember for all the wrong reasons for Lucy & Mario

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: As the dust settles on Sunday’s explosive episode, what next for Lucy and Mario? Gemma launches her brand new diet club, Bobby’s quest to become a dad continues plus could there be the patter of tint feet for Lauren and Kirk…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: All the latest drama from Essex as Lucy searches for the truth about Mario, Gemma’s Diet Club continues on horseback, Joey starts recruiting staff for his brand new shop, and could it be third time lucky for Kirk and Lauren…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 4

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. After their twitter rant – what next for Lucy and Mario? The cast celebrate Mother’s Day Essex-style,.

programme.desc: Tom Pearce takes new girl Abi on a surprise date. Arg comes to the rescue of a new homeless Gemma. And tempers fray between Bobby and Gemma at Ricky’s Comedy night.

programme.desc: Arg enlists the services of Charlie and Bobby for his St Patrick’s night party. Gemma faces a few home truths. Sparks fly as Jasmin and Ricky come to blows, and tongues are wagging as some hot new boys come to town…

programme.desc: Ricky & Little Chris bond with the new hunks Dan and James. Gemma attempts to build bridges - but can she and Bobby ever make up? Frankie and Chloe bury the hatchet and invite Sam and Joey around for a family bonding dinner party.

programme.desc: It’s the day of Joey’s long awaited shop launch… how will it go? Will anyone turn up? Will he work out how to use the till? Is there enough stock? How will he cope? Chloe tells Sam a few home truths… Plus – Mario’s back in town…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Mario and Chris have unfinished business. Chloe has a heart to heart with Sam. Jasmin and Abi double date James and Dan Joey, Arg, Diags and Tom P organize a mole stakeout in Billie’s garden.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In a drama and romance-filled series finale, the boys face up to each other on the five-a-side football pitch and Joey jets Sam off to Dubai to pop the big question…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Team TOWIE is back and heading to the Costa-Del-Essex for a two part Marbella special – expect plenty of sun, sea, sangria and shenanigans as everyone’s favourites hit the beach and enjoy the nightlife on their annual Spanish jaunt.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…|Part two of the TOWIE Marbella special, with tears, tantrums, drama, gossip and plenty of real tan action…

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: As the sun sets on Marbella, Team TOWIE is back in Essex and the fallout from the Spanish expedition begins. Is it the beginning of the end for Joey and Sam? Will Lucy and Dan be more than just a holiday romance?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S9 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Loves young dream, will Diags finally find love? Lil Chris better watch out because Mario is on the war path. Is it make up or break up for TOWIE’s golden couple Joey and Sam?

programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. It’s a Father’s Day to remember with a big revelation from Dan. Chloe and Billie come to blows over Joey and Sam.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 807
programme.desc: After checking out the local guys, girls and geysers in Iceland, the Geordies head back to the Toon, where it all kicks off as Aaron and Scott find out the truth about Gary and Marnie. (S8, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 901
programme.desc: Buzzin'! Our favourite party animals are back! Everyone is shocked when Vicky gets a promotion and becomes their boss. Holly tries to stay classy by not jumping into bed with Kyle. (S9, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 902
programme.desc: Holly has a house party but there's a massive kick-off between the lads when Marnie tries to make Aaron jealous by necking on with Kyle. (S9, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 903
programme.desc: The Geordies head to Paris for a Tash-on Tours job. Vicky gets unprofessionally mortal at work, and, on returning to the Toon, Charlotte leaves for crisis talks with her boyfriend. (S9, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Charlotte and Gary find themselves gravitating together after she returns from a showdown with her boyfriend. Vicky struggles to convince Marnie to take work seriously. (S9, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Geordies hit the road to host a Tash-On Tours hoedown for young farmers in Gloucestershire. \"Psycho\" Charlotte is back when she sees Gary talking to another girl. (S9, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Gary pretends to get a tattoo of Charlotte's initials behind his ear, but she freaks out and says something she regrets. Meanwhile there's drama between Aaron and Marnie. (S9, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: It's Christmas in the Geordie Shore house! But there are tears amidst the tinsel when Vicky returns with unexpected news. Kyle hopes for a special Xmas present from Holly. (S9, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: When Charlotte finds out about a pact between Gary and Aaron she hatches a plan - but will she end up with egg on her face? Meanwhile James is having doubts about his future in the house. (S10, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1002
programme.desc: James makes a shock announcement and two new housemates come through the door. But the newbies' first night out is ruined when a fight breaks out between Charlotte, Marnie and Holly. (S10, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1003
programme.desc: It's the Newbies' first morning in the house but with Holly, Kyle and Charlotte gone how will the family get back together? A shock revelation from Gary leaves Charlotte heartbroken. (S10, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1004
programme.desc: It's the day that Charlotte's been dreading, Gary introduces his new girlfriend to the family but will Psycho Charlotte put in an appearance? Meanwhile Marnie and Aaron get very flirty! (S10, ep4)

programme.desc: When Anna says there's a job for the Geordies in another country, they're all buzzing! That is until they turn up to a Caravan site in Wales. Marnie decides to give Aaron some home truths. (S10, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: Hamburg is about to feel the full force of Tash on Tours, but are they ready for Marnie kicking off at Aaron? Holly's getting paranoid about her non-relationship with Kyle. (S10, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Chloe meets \"Psycho Charlotte\" after a night out goes sour, and Holly's return is ruined when she's confronted with the true reason Kyle doesn't want to make their relationship official. (S10, ep7)

programme.desc: Scotty T is back to 'jump start' the final episode with a dare-devil activity for his Geordie crew. Meanwhile, tensions run high as Holly waits to hear Kyle's decision. Last in the series. (S10, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1104

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1105
programme.desc: Gaz gives newly dumped Holly some tough love. Kyle enjoys his first lads' night until the girls turn up unannounced. Charlotte kicks off leaving the boys and girls torn apart. (S11, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S11 Ep. 1110
programme.desc: After Chloe dropped the L-bomb, Scott wants a word. There's a surprise arrival for one of the family and Marnie has some massive news. Last in the series. (S11, ep10)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S12 Ep. 1201
programme.desc: The Geordies are back! Chloe turns on her charm to try to get with Scott. Holly has a huge secret but will she tell anyone? A shock new arrival sees the lads buzzin' and Chloe stressing. (S12, ep1)

programme.desc: Vinny talks to Jionni and they resolve their differences, leaving Vin and Nicole free to resume their friendship. Meanwhile, Mike finally acknowledges the mistakes he made in the past. (S6, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S6 Ep. 613
programme.desc: It's the end of summer and the end of a long road for the roommates as they prepare to say their last goodbyes to Seaside. (S6, ep13)

programme.desc: The Guidos and Guidettes get together for one last time in a special reunion show to relive the highs and lows from six seasons of outrageous and hilarious antics.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Jersey Shore kicks off when eight soon-to-be roommates move into a summer share. Romance heats up in the house and the guys invite three random girls to join them in the hot tub. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Feeling like an outcast, Snooki tells the others that she's leaving the Shore. The roommates' first club night out gets flirty. Mike and Sammy's situation turns into a love triangle. (S1, ep2)

programme.desc: The love triangle gets even more intense when Ronnie catches Sammy giving her number to another guy. And a housemate chooses to leave the Shore for good. (S1, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 104
programme.desc: After a night at the clubs, Pauly and Mike have to juggle multiple groups of girls. And mayhem breaks out when a fight erupts at a bar, and one of the housemates goes down. (S1, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 105
programme.desc: Snooki's violent encounter at the bar brings the housemates closer together, and she finally feels like she's a part of the family. Ronnie and Sammy's relationship reaches new heights. (S1, ep5)

programme.desc: The situation gets out of control when Mike has girls back to the house. Snooki fights again, and Ronnie gets into a brawl of his own, leaving Sammi questioning their relationship. (S1, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: The summer's winding down, but the drama doesn't stop. Pauly's got a stalker and a fight lands another roommate in jail. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 109
