programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 111
programme.desc: Questions are answered when Snooki, The Situation, JWOWW, DJ Pauly D, Angelina, Ronnie, Sammi and Vinny return for more fights and insights into what happened down at the Jersey Shore. (S1, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S1 Ep. 113
programme.desc: Every summer, thousands of kids head to the Jersey Shore to take part in that East Coast rite of passage: The Share House. Jersey Shore captures that phenomenon.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: The Jersey Shore crew is headed to Miami! They are shocked by the surprise arrival of former housemate, Angelina, and the drama picks up right where it left off at the seaside. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Sammi tries to figure out what Ronnie really did at the club the night before. When Angelina interrupts Pauly's game, we see a whole new side of the usually calm Pauly D. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Angelina apologises to the girls. But back at the house, Mike, Vinny and Pauly have a close encounter with grenades in the hot tub, while Ron continues to creep behind Sammi's back. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Ron's bad behaviour puts Snooki, Angelina and JWOWW in a tough spot. Together the girls decide to write an 'anonymous' letter to Sammi and finally reveal the entire truth. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Sammi finds Snooki and Jenni's 'anonymous' letter, and this time it's really over with Ronnie. Mike, Vinny and Pauly ('MVP') have their hands full, juggling four girls in one night! (S2, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: The anonymous note causes tension between the girls, culminating in a full-blown cat-fight. And after sharing a night in bed with Vinny, Snooki reveals a not-so-little known fact. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The roommates deal with the aftermath of the fight. Angelina starts dating Jose, a guy from the club; Jenni and Snooki clean up the smush room in preparation for Snooki's hook-up. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spencer asks Heidi to move in with him but Heidi doesn't know what to do or how to tell her roommate, Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lauren's 21st birthday is full of surprises when Heidi and Audrina throw her a party.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: With a new job on the line, Whitney stumbles in her biggest opportunity with Teen Vogue.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: In this season finale, tension comes to a head as Heidi makes her final decision about moving in with Spencer.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lauren doesn't go to Heidi and Spencer's housewarming party.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren and Heidi grow even farther apart when Spencer asks Heidi to marry him.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Lauren tries to help Audrina decide if Justin is boyfriend material.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Heidi takes her fiancé Spencer to meet her family in Colorado.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi's social circle shrinks as Spencer breaks up with Brody for hanging out with Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Lauren gets a blast from the past when her ex-boyfriend Jason calls.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren's feelings for Jason are rekindled, but when they run into Heidi and Spencer, tempers flare.

programme.title: The Hills S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Lauren is shocked to learn that Jason has a girlfriend, but Jason has a bigger surprise for her.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The CEO of Menchie's, Amit Kleinberger, tries to stay cool while working undercover in his dessert dynasty. The youngest Boss ever goes deeper in his undercover mission than he ever expected to go. Can the Boss go the "extra smile"?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Paul Quentel, CEO of Alfred Angelo, flexes his muscles for an undercover mission in his bridal shops. The Boss isn't afraid to walk the walk. In an Undercover Boss first, the Boss works with an employee who's hearing impaired.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Mike Bloom, President & COO of Family Dollar, pays an undercover visit to his 'cheap sheik' discount stores. One employee feels her store is lacking the 'family' in Family Dollar. Will the boss rise to the occasion when working with a forklift operator?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The President of Dutch Bros. Coffee, Travis Boersma, goes undercover to see what keeps his high-energy coffee chain brewing on all cylinders. The boss discovers he wants to go deeper undercover and embarks on a global journey to El Salvador.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Seven former bosses reflect on their memorable "busted" moments. The tables are turned when a former boss dons one last disguise.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Shane Evans, COO of Massage Heights, goes undercover to find the kinks in her company. One store's disregard for company policy rubs the Boss the wrong way. Can the boss of one of the largest massage chains in North America actually give a massage?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: In the series first, a Native American Boss goes undercover. Bruce "Two Dogs" Bozsum, Chairman of Mohegan Sun Casino, goes all in while undercover inside his Indian gaming empire. Does the Boss have enough gas in the tank to work the valet line?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Joe Didomizio, CEO of Hudson Group, goes undercover to find out if his company is still the "traveler's best friend." What happens when this travel king discovers turmoil in the terminals? Will working as a barista prove too hot to handle for this boss?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Greg Miller, CEO of the NBA's Utah Jazz, suits up for an undercover mission. What will happen when the boss discovers not every bounce is going his way? This laid-back boss tries to find his "inner cheerleader" while working the stands as a Team Member.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: In a series first, it's the employees going undercover, not the Boss. How will one undercover employee respond when faced with mission failure? How will the Boss react when he discovers his orders have been ignored?

programme.title: Undercover Boss S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Jeff Platt, the series' youngest CEO, goes undercover in his high-flying trampoline empire. How will the Boss react when one employee jumps to conclusions about his true identity? The Boss loses a spring in his step when tasked with building trampolines.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: CEO John Tracogna goes undercover at Canada’s largest zoo to get up close and personal with endangered wildlife and the people that keep the organization running.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Pizza Pizza CEO Paul Goddard goes undercover in the nation’s number one pizza mega brand, and learns that making dough and delivering pizza serves up some challenges he never imagined.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Brian Scudamore, 1-800-GOT-JUNK? founder and CEO, goes undercover as a driver and junk collector, hauling loads of unwanted clutter in the world’s largest junk removal franchise, and comes out collecting something much more valuable.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Toronto Transit Commission (TTC) City Councillor and TTC Chair Karen Stintz goes undercover inside the country's largest mass transit system to get her hands dirty with some of the toughest and grittiest jobs.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: CEO Ellis Jacob goes undercover doling out snacks and tickets while assessing how to enhance the moviegoer experience within Canada’s largest motion picture exhibitor across the board.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: CEO Ellis Jacob goes undercover doling out snacks and tickets while assessing how to enhance the moviegoer experience within Canada’s largest motion picture exhibitor across the board.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Stacey Mowbray, CEO of Canada’s largest specialty coffee company goes undercover and gets into the grind serving lattes to get an edge on customer service and revive her connection with frontline workers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jane Riddell, chief operating officer of GoodLife Fitness, disguises herself as a Zumba-instructor trainee, a maintenance worker and a salesperson.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Michael Sneyd, CEO of mega resort business Skyline International Development, goes undercover to get creative with the employees at the foot of the chain and take their ideas to new heights.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lisa Lisson, the first female president of FedEx Express Canada, goes undercover to find out if her employees have the right resources to provide exceptional service in the fiercely competitive courier industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Boss Terry Davis has been with Home Hardware Stores for 42 years. He worked his way up to the top – now he’s returning to the shop floors and factories to turn flaws into fixes.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Canlan Ice Sports Corp is the largest private owner of sports facilities in North America. CEO Joey St Aubin admits their prices are higher than local municipal rinks, but believes his company offers a premium service and better ice quality.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Purdy’s dominates the West Coast, but is struggling to make an impression elsewhere. To boost sales, the Chocolate Queen travels the country, working in disguise in her own stores and factory floors.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This episode nets an exclusive “behind the scenes” look at what it really takes to get fish on our dinner plates.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The Victorian Order of Nurses takes the pressure off hospitals by providing care for people in their own homes. Hundreds of rival companies compete for cash and customers.

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tervita specializes in environmental clean-up for Western Canada’s booming energy and mining industries. It doesn’t take long for Fory Musser,

programme.title: Undercover Boss Canada S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Kristen Flynn, the boss of Premiere Van Lines. She’s a woman with a formidable reputation. Her own staff call her “Frugal Flynn” because she watches the pennies to protect profit.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tonight, Dr Pixie sees a man who's had an itchy bottom for 20 years, while Dr Dawn's talking periods with three fearless girls who volunteer to measure their own menstrual flow.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Doctor Christian helps 37-year-old Adam who has a rare penis problem. Suffering for the past ten years he is now in danger of losing both the ability to urinate and have sex.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Obesity is an epidemic that's out of control and when Dr Christian first met 56-year-old Patience in 2012 she was super morbidly obese, with a basketball sized abdominal hernia.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In the clinic Dr Pixie helps a young man with a six-year posterior problem that started with a tiny hair but ended up as a gaping hole.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The portable clinic pitches up in Caerphilly Wales and Dr Dawn helps a lady who's hiding a secret pain inside her national dress and a man whose been walking through his problems for twenty years.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The Embarrassing Bodies doctors are back and in the second episode of the new series Dr Christian takes that message to the stressed-out city of London.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: First up is Janice, who had breast cancer in 1996 and underwent a mastectomy, leaving her with only one breast. Although her left breast was reconstructed, she no longer has a nipple.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The Embarrassing Bodies team meet up with some of their patients again to see if they're still making good progress.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Fifty-eight year old Anthony is back to see Dr Christian to tell him about life after testicular cancer. Dionne is back to see Dr Dawn to see the progression of her painful skin condition.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dr Dawn sets up camp at a festival in Scotland. Dr Dawn meets a man with an irritating problem under his kilt and a couple who's night of passion turned into a bit of a balls-up.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: The unshockeable Embarrassing Doctors are ready to treat more brave souls in the clinic, and tonight, the first patient in is Michelle, who can't go for a poo without using her fingers to ease it out.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Dr Christian finds a solution for an elderly patient who's been so desperate for help she's even resorted to soaking her feet in urine.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tthe portable pod lands at Love Luton Festival where some mysterious cases pop up. A young women arrives with monster bruises and a lady with unexplained skin patches all over her body.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In tonight's show, Dr Christian sees a man with a fishy smell coming from his penis while Dr Pixie helps a woman whose nipples stick out above her bra after botched breast surgery abroad.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Tonight, on Embarrassing Bodies, we are looking back at the 'best of the breasts' revisiting our most memorable cases, to see how they've been getting on.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The doctors catch up with a woman who had excessive facial hair, and another with an inverted nipple. And Dr Christian gives an update on how young men should check for testicular cancer.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tonight the Embarrassing Bodies doctors take to the seaside town of Brighton where they get to the bottom of a bleeding anus and pus filled tonsils.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: In tonight's show our doctors look back at our lumpiest cases. Whether it's lumps on your balls or boils on your bottom, over the years Embarrassing Bodies has seen the lot.

programme.title: Embarrassing Bodies S4 Ep. 20

programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The FBI Files S7 Ep. 114
programme.desc: In the 70s and 80s a gang of thugs wreaked havoc on the island of Puerto Rico. Organized, experienced and deadly they seemed beyond the reach of the law.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 89
programme.desc: In the 1970's a string of bank robberies and bombings spread fear and destruction along the east coast. The FBI faced a new breed of criminal, the domestic terrorist.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 32
programme.desc: A serial rapist targeted women. His dark urges raged out of control and led him to murder. He followed a path so random it was impossible to trace, and all that tied him to his crimes were his access to the highways and a bizarre sexual fetish.

programme.title: The FBI Files S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Thomas Dillon killed five outdoorsmen at random over a period of three years in rural southern Ohio. After a tip led the FBI to the murder weapon, ballistic testing made a match.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 98
programme.desc: They were a gang of criminal masterminds. They carried automatic weapons and were not afraid to use them. With each and every new heist, they became bolder and more deadly, until the FBI stepped in, determined to end their violent rampage.

programme.title: Critical Rescue S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: On November 22, 1997, Caleb Record drives his friend George Place home from basketball practice. The roads in Newfane, Vermont are slick following an early winter ice storm.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a Judge and his politician wife are murdered in their home. The killer left few clues. It looked like a professional hit, and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI refused to give up.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 62
programme.desc: Some people do get away with murder at least for a while. Flush with their success, serial killers murder again and again. But each time they kill, they leave behind a few more clues, which ultimately lead to their capture.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 87
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, an inmate escaped with the help of his female accomplice. Following a trail of fraudulent credit card receipts and deaths, authorities track the pair, but always find themselves one step behind.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 103
programme.desc: In the 1980s, the United States faced a deadly new enemy abroad, an expanding network of terrorists targeting American interests. Hundreds of innocent people were killed in bombings, executions, and hijackings.

programme.title: The FBI Files S3 Ep. 48
programme.desc: A burning body in a dark alley shed light on a cold-blooded killer. His partners in crime would tell the story, if they lived. In the underworld of the drug trade, even a childhood friend can quickly become an enemy.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S6 Ep. 67
programme.desc: A dog can be a dead man's best friend. Dogs have been trained to sniff out corpses, drugs, explosives, and missing persons. They're often the first to find the essential clue that sets an investigation in motion.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 30
programme.desc: In 1995, our nation's capital was also our nation's murder capital. Even the police weren't safe. While Washington, DC, law enforcement targeted criminals, the criminals targeted law enforcement, even gunning down officers on patrol.

programme.title: The FBI Files S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: A mother and child are kidnapped a bystander is murdered. Violence such as this shattered a quiet Texas neighborhood and exposed a drug cartel that flourished where it was least expected.

programme.title: The FBI Files S4 Ep. 66
programme.desc: On July 2nd 1994, a 12-year-old girl was abducted from her home in northern California. The FBI knows to act fast, search wide, enlist volunteers. But as the hours slipped by, agents also realized their chances for recovering her alive grew slim.

programme.title: The FBI Files S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: In the 1990s, neighborhoods in Detroit were terrorized by a gang of robbers. Impersonating police officers, they invaded over 100 homes robbing, raping and torturing their victims.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Case Studies in Forensic Science S9 Ep. 119
programme.desc: To the astute detective and forensic specialist, the biggest clues often hide in plain sight, and what seems trivial to some is in reality Critical Evidence.

programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Tony teams up with Chef and Author Andy Ricker of Pok Pok Restaurant fame. He's made a name for himself faithfully reproducing the cuisine of Northern Thailand at his restaurants in Portland and NYC.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Few countries have a more contentious relationship with the United States than Iran. In this episode we heads to this Shia Muslim nation to explore a country few Americans have visited since the 80s.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony travels to Las Vegas Nevada with his food author friend Michael Ruhlman. Whatever your need, whatever bad behaviour you’d like to display Las Vegas is the place that will allow it... for a price.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: After eight years, Tony returns to South Korea. And this time, he’s no stranger to kimchi. But just as Tony has changed, so has Korea.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony heads back to his much-beloved Salvador, Brazil. The ever-present street festivals and the famous Carnival parade begin with sitting down with a local artist in the streets of the historic Pelo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: In this episode Tony travels to the lesser-known, North Eastern Coast of Jamaica. White sandy beaches and a cool breeze with a tropical umbrella drink in hand is usually the perception of island life.

programme.desc: It's touch and go for a python that has been attacked by two dogs; Johnny's artistic side is ignited, and Julia tries to control some misbehaving kids.

programme.desc: Riley has a fear of stingrays. Like many people the death of Croc Hunter Steve Irwin led him to believe that stingrays are dangerous animals. But are they? To find out and to challenge his fear, Riley heads out to meet a bunch of stingrays.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: It's all about the fear factor this time, as Julia deals with a potted threat first, before catching a tiny house dweller, and scaling a rooftop to rescue a big snake.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Julia will get a love-bite from her favorite snake, Bonny the dog continues her snake detection training, and then there's a deadly wrangle with a juvenile eastern brown.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Julia rescues a terrified Russian rapper from a neighborhood "gangster", Johnny finds himself in a tug of war with a python and bonny gets her first shot looking for snakes in the field.

programme.desc: Julia faces off against an unwelcome house guest in the form of an inquisitive serpent. Meanwhile, the new member of the team, Bonny, goes to doggy boot camp.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 9

programme.title: Sharks: The Big Five

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gary Brown's visit to an African chimp sanctuary becomes a deadly struggle when he and his guide are attacked by the colony's escaped alpha male. Idaho Zoo's 'Feast for the Beast' fundraiser takes a bloody turn when a 600-pound Siberian tiger breaks free.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: The East Australian Grey Nurse is the only shark in the world that is critically endangered. More than 50% of the animals are carrying hooks and traces from fisherman's lines. Interaction with humans is endangering this animal.

programme.title: Shark Man with Riley Elliott S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It's everyone's worst nightmare  eaten alive by a shark. But how likely is this to happen? Riley is out to debunk the myths about shark attacks. He will be giving us clear instructions on what to do and how to stay safe when confronted by a shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: It is a snake snack-o-rama. Johnny and Julia rescue a pet budgie before its too late. Johnny wrangles another python. And the both of them welcome a new member to the snake catching team.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Julia grapples with a massive python, before encountering a lightning fast whip snake and visiting a hospital to talk snake bites.

programme.title: Human Prey S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: While diving for shellfish off Cape Howe, an Australian man ends up inside the jaws of a Great White shark. Determined to maintain his championship spear fishing title, an Australian man inadvertently becomes bait for a 15-foot-long Great White shark.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: On their own in the Pacific Ocean are the Chatham Islands: wild, remote, and circled by a population of great white sharks.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In pristine waters, in one of the most remote locations on earth, lives a mysterious species of shark.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 15

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Julia teams up with a terrier to track down a suspected deadly intruder. Meanwhile, she rescues Bob from a tetchy python, and comes up with a great marketing idea.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Johnny Gets trapped in a tight spot with an unhappy snake. Julia finds herself in a very precarious battle with a python. And finally a bitter sweet visit to the RSPCA.

programme.desc: Pauanui Beach has been closed due to sharks. What type of shark are they and what are they doing here? Riley is on a mission to find out. Once the species has been identified Riley sets about catching and tagging them.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Johnny has one stinker of a day and Julia teaches us a few things about owning and caring for a lizard before dealing with a deadly trespasser.

programme.title: Ocean Predators S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The New Zealand sea lion is more than just the most endangered sea lion on Earth.

programme.title: Snake Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Johnny rescues a python in the poo, Julia starts a new business venture before facing off against two very deadly snakes.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Julia saves a karate school from a highly venomous visitor. Meanwhile, Johnny Bagpipes leaves his lady flying solo as he prepares to fly to Rome.

programme.title: Snake Boss S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It's all about the fear factor this time, as Julia deals with a potted threat first, before catching a tiny house dweller, and scaling a rooftop to rescue a big snake.

programme.desc: Training is in full flow for Bonny the dog on her quest to sniff out snakes, but Julia is called poolside to fish out one cool snake, before facing an extremely close call.

programme.desc: Julia is led on an exhausting and not so merry chase by one of the world's most dangerous snakes.

programme.desc: A teenager's family falls apart, so he finds a better one.

programme.desc: The girls visit the carpet vendor to fix their carpet, while Zeta and Nazboo plan to take some magic thread. / Zeta and Nazboo tell the girls the fun story of how they first met, but their facts don't quite match up.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Nazboo gets sick with Dragon Pox, and Leah, Shimmer, and Shine go on an adventure to find the magical cure. The girls meet a Lightning Genie and help him catch his runaway lightning bolt before it causes any trouble.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 16

programme.desc: When costumes get magically stuck on Shimmer, Shine and Leah, they must track down a special feather to undo the magic. Zeta impersonates the girls' potions teacher and tricks them into helping her brew a sneaky potion.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Crusher tries to cheat at a carnival game, he accidentally strands himself and Pickle on a giant rocket! Now it’s up to Blaze and AJ to rescue the two trucks before their runaway rocket crashes into the garbage dump.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Leah and Zac are practicing for the big skateboard competition when Leah's skateboard breaks. When Leah asks her favorite genies for a new board, Shimmer and Shine accidentally give her the wrong kind of board: a surfboard!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Team Truck Challenge, a race where all the trucks get to compete in teams of two! But when Crusher chooses a new partner instead of Pickle, his disappointed sidekick teams up with Blaze to prove his mettle.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Leah wins a genie bottle pendant at a carnival and is surprised to find that her prize comes with a bonus – genies Shimmer and Shine. Parte 2.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: It’s the day of the Dragon Island Duel, a race around tropical Dragon Island! But when Crusher cheats and sends Blaze away before the race, AJ must set out to rescue his best friend and bring him back to the starting line.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Dora and Boots become book explorers and enter the worlds of Peter Pan, the Wizard of Oz, and Little Red Riding Hood so they can find missing objects for the library's Story Wall.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The girls befriend a cute creature, only to find out that their magic doesn't work when it's nearby. / Zeta's relaxing night at the treehouse is halted when the girls also show up, so she tries to scare them away.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: The Grumpy Old Troll's getting married to Petunia and we all get to be a part of this wedding! Everything's almost ready, except the Grumpy Old Troll forgot to pick up the rings from his Grandma's House! Will we make it in time for the wedding?!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 610
programme.desc: Dora's dance class is having a big show for all of their friends and family. Dora's starting the show and she can't wait for her family to see her dance!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 993
programme.desc: Dora Saves the Crystal Kingdom: Dora and Boots travel into a storybook to help their new friend Allie save the Crystal Kingdom. And they need your help! A Greedy King has taken all of the crystals that make the kingdom colorful.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Leah babysits the rambunctious pets as Shimmer and Shine secretly build them new, fun bedrooms. When a baby bird mistakes Zeta for its mom, the girls must help her return it to its nest.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Dora and Boots need to help the Fairy Godmother fix her magic wand, so she can get her puppy back!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 20

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shimmer and Shine fall for Zeta's bottle trap! Leah and the pets must figure out how to save them. It's the Zahramay Falls Magic Carpet Race! Shimmer, Shine, Leah, and Zeta all compete for the prized genie gem.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 998
programme.desc: Dora's Fairytale Adventure: Dora and Boots are exploring in the forest when they discover the gate to Fairy-Tale Land and enter this magical place. But...there's a mean witch who lives in Fairy-Tale Land.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 25
programme.desc: When Uzma takes the magic jewel that powers Zeacorn Cove, the girls and their new Zeacorns friends set out to retrieve it. The girls and Arabella discover new magic in a secret cave, but trouble arises when Zeta takes the magic for herself.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and Gabby meet a brand new monster machine named Watts – a super fast truck with electric tires! But when one of her special tires goes rolling into the jungle, Blaze, AJ, and Gabby promise to help her get it back.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: Happy Birthday, Super Babies!: It's the Twins' 1st birthday and Dora reads them a very special Super Babies story. Once upon a time, there was a Cake-snatching Bear who stole all the cakes from the birthday boys and girls.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 719
programme.desc: Dora and Diego's Amazing Animal Circus Adventure: Join Dora and Diego on an adventure to see Boots and Baby Jaguar's Amazing Animal Circus, featuring Perrito, the kitties, Tico, Isa, Benny, and lots more animal friends!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Astronauts Leah and Zac are on a quest to speak to an alien through their walkie talkies. When Leah wishes to be able to talk to one, Shimmer and Shine poof an alien into her backyard, where she can talk to one face to face!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 996
programme.desc: Dora's World Adventure: All over the world, everyone's celebrating Friendship Day! But when Swiper mistakenly swipes all the special glowing Friendship Bracelets, Dora needs to team up with him to bring them back to the Friendship Parades.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 18

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Blaze and Pegwheel the Pirate have teamed up for the ultimate treasure hunt! Together they must find three keys to unlock a special chest. But Crusher’s sailing the high seas too, and he’ll do anything to get the treasure first!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 15
programme.desc: The girls meet the Dream Genie and her apprentice, who have the power to make dreams come true. / Samira gives the kids a tour of the magical rooms in her palace, where she makes wishing items for Leah's world.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, and lots of spectators have gathered to watch herds of dinosaurs march through Axle City! But when Crusher pushes his way into the parade, he scatters dinos everywhere, and it’s up to Blaze, AJ, and Zeg to find and rescue them.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 710

programme.desc: Gabby is the mechanic all the Monster Machines in town count on to fix them up. But when Crusher steals all her tools, Gabby needs Blaze's help to get them back!

programme.desc: As the girls search for Leah's lost necklace, an underground creature finds it and begins making wishes with it. / After Zac wishes to stay in Zahramay Falls forever, the kids search for a powerful genie to reverse the wish.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine meet a mermaid and explore her underwater world. Shimmer, Shine, and Leah explore an ice palace in their search for a magical gem.

programme.desc: When Kaz worries he's not brave enough, he adventures with the kids to find a Bravery Gem to help him. / Nazboo finds a kazoo that makes magic stronger when you play it, including Zeta's.

programme.desc: Nazboo goes off to help a genie with his deliveries, but Zeta worries she's lost him and enlists the girls' help to find him. When the girls learn to cloud surf, Shine gets overexcited and tries to ride the biggest wave at Cloud Beach.

programme.desc: The boys go undercover to defend their video game dominance at the Frycade. Sanjay and Craig decide to get a dog but end up with 100 dogs.

programme.desc: In an effort to not be the forgotten men of Royal Woods Elementary, Lincoln and Clyde do whatever it takes to get into yearbook group photos. Seeing his sisters squabble with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a roommate shuffle.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 13
programme.desc: From Butch Hartman, the creator of the hit Nicktoon The Fairly OddParents, Danny Phantom is the animated action/comedy story of 14-year-old Danny Fenton, who uses his razor-sharp wit and amazing ghost-like superpowers to transfo

programme.title: The Loud House S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: After Dad gets upset with the kids for never locking the front door, the kids take home security to the next level./When Lincoln accidentally erases all of his childhood photos, he and Clyde try to recreate them before Lincoln's memory fades.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 5
programme.desc: There's a new ghost in town - Amorpho, who can become anyone he sees. He decide to switch with Danny but when their powers collide, it makes a mess of things!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Jimmy redesigns his Nanobots to correct his homework, but soon they start to correct everything in the world.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: The Guys in White have finally caught on: Jack's a genius, how could they have not seen this before? They offer Jack and Maddie millions for FentonWorks and before you can say "movin' on up" -- right next to mayor Vlad!

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: When Sanjay and Craig get the once in a lifetime opportunity to work at the Frycade, they soon discover Belle's secret life. Sanjay develops an allergy to Craig - could this mean the end of the dude snake duo?

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Ketta rebuilds Lil Loafie into a law enforcement machine in 'Roboloafie', and then in 'Bad Zituation', SwaySway runs away to Monster Island when he gets a zit that he thinks makes him look hideous.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S3 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An old rivalry between Darlene and Noodman is reignited when the guys discover a Friend Card. Sanjay and Craig become beach bums for a day.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The Box Ghost is tired of being unappreciated as a terrifying ghost. Frustrated, he turns to the box belonging to Pandora, and every time he opens it he unleashes a new evil on the town!

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A dare leads Jimmy and pals to stay over night at Retroland to prove once and fall all the existence of the park's phantom. Not to dissimilar to 1958's 'The Fly', an accident rearranges the bodies and heads of Jimmy and Carl's pet hamster.

programme.title: Danny Phantom S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: From Butch Hartman, the creator of the hit Nicktoon The Fairly OddParents, Danny Phantom is the animated action/comedy story of 14-year-old Danny Fenton, who uses his razor-sharp wit and amazing ghost-like superpowers to transfo

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Grandpa returns back to grade school so he can finally fulfill his dream of graduating. Mr. Simmons gives the class an assignment to couple up and takes care of an egg over the weekend.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone Timmy cares about has vanished. Every Fairy has a small organ known as the Fagigly Gland which enables them to poof into anything at anytime but Cosmo's has gone bad.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Wishy Washy/Poof's Play Date: Dad entrusts Timmy with washing and preserving his classic Stryker Z sports car! Wanda worries that Poof doesn’t have interaction with other fairy babies, so Timmy turns the adult fairies into babies, so Poof can play with.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Every wild animal except the beaver has been launched into space. Dag and Norb hop on an experimental space shuttle.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Odd Squad/For Emergencies Only: Timmy wishes he had a talking car. Cosmo and Wanda are so busy with Poof they’re neglecting Timmy.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Eating Contest/Rhonda's Glasses: Like his Grandfather before him, Arnold competes in the annual block party eating contest. After intense training, Arnold meets an area eating legend, Seymour "The Disposal," in a final showdown.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 13
programme.desc: 9 Lives/Dread 'n' Breakfast: When Catman tells Timmy that he’s used up 8 of his 9 cat lives saving Dimmsdale from crime, Timmy helps Catman find a "safer" job where he can still help people. Mom turns the house into a bed and breakfast!

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When their mother gives birth to two new children, Norbert and Daggett are forced to leave the family dam and build their own.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 78
programme.desc: Helga is recommended for counseling after Mr. Simmons observes her berating Arnold, arguing with her parents, etc. She learns that unrequited love is very normal and that she's actually okay.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Dag and Norb resist their natural urge to hibernate and 'Go-Go South' for the winter.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After a wished-up lava flow accidentally demolishes Vicky's house, her whole family is invited to stay with the Turners.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A Boy and His Dog-Boy/Crock Blocked: Timmy wishes Mr. Crocker would disappear. Crocker becomes invisible. Dad thinks the house is haunted. Timmy wishes Sparky was a human. Timmy becomes a dog and has to convince Sparky to change back to canine form.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Daggett saves cereal box-tops to get a street sweeper. Spawning salmon invade the beavers' lake.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Space-CADAD/Summer Bummer: The Squirrely Scouts go to space to plant a flag in uncharted territory and gain special Flying Squirrely Status. Chloe gives up her summer for research. This upsets her inner child causing her to make crazy sleep wishes.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 31
programme.desc: The High Life/Best Friends: Gerald gets in over his financial head selling a sure-fire product.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 4
programme.desc: The Fair Bears/Return of the L.O.S.E.R.S.: Chloe’s favorite cartoon characters come to life and brainwash Timmy and Wanda. Timmy’s enemies learn that he is helpless without his fairies and try to destroy him when he’s weak.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Which is Wish/Nuts & Dangerous: Timmy and Chloe switch places, but when Cosmo loses the wands, they risk being stuck as each other forever. Dad and Timmy enter a film festival for some father-son bonding, but things get out-of-hand when Dad casts Catman.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Arnold and Helga are chosen to represent the school in the citywide spelling bee./Arnold takes one of his sick pigeons to the mysterious Pigeon Man who miraculously cures the bird.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The boys learn the hard way that being on TV isn't all its cracked up to be when they let a renowned nature filmmaker film them.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: School of Crock: Poof is going through "pooferty" and is finally learning to speak! Meanwhile, Mr. Crocker becomes a teacher at the Fairy Academy and tries to steal all the students’ magic!

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 41
programme.desc: Aptitude Test/Oskar Gets A Job: After the results of an aptitude test are announced, Harold gains self-confidence and Helga feels dumber. Arnold is instrumental in persuading Oskar to actually get off his butt and get a temporary job.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Otto and Twister look down on boogie boarding, so Sam feels left out of the group. The other kids blame Sam for giving them the flu and keeping them from playing a crucial street hockey game.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 73
programme.desc: Arnold's weird cousin, Arnie, arrives for a visit and appears to be the biggest loser to everyone except Lila. Oskar's wife Susie agrees to watch her cousin's baby, also named Oskar.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Timmy wishes for super Magician powers to perform at his parents' booth during the neighborhood fair.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Eugene is falsely accused of pulling a fire alarm./Arnold becomes fascinated with the Book of World Records.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Two and a Half Babies/Anchor's Away: Foop and Poof have to take care of an egg for a school project. Foop breaks it and swaps it with a dangerous one. Chet Ubetcha quits his job. Dad becomes the new news man.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Timmy learns he merely slowed down The Darkness and now he must seek a second wand to defeat this evil force. Timmy is forced to make amends with his enemies in order to fight for mankind.

programme.title: Rocket Power S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Twister has to look after his cousin the same day the new human sky torpedo ride opens at the amusement park. When a huge storm hits ocean shores, Ray forbids Otto to surf its dangerous waves.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Merry Wishmas!: When Timmy doesn’t get what he wants for Christmas he simply wishes for it. But his friends can’t do the same, so Timmy wishes every kid could get a magical coupon that would allow them to wish for the one thing they didn't get.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cat ‘n Mouse/Chip off the Old Crock: Timmy and Chloe have to help a depressed Catman prove to his girlfriend that he’s a real superhero. Mr. Crocker teaches his nephew to be a FAIRY catcher.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 54
programme.desc: Grandpa's Birthday/Road Trip: Grandpa thinks he's going to die soon because no one in his family ever made it past his age. He prepares to die, and Arnold tries to convince him that life is still worth living.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 49
programme.desc: All the kids are paired with adults with interesting jobs except Arnold, who is forced to spend time with the Jolly Olly Man. / Harold believes it's his life's calling to become a butcher, but he slowly drives Mr. Greene, the butcher, crazy.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Door 16/Arnold as Cupid: The boarders are all suspicious of the mysterious Mr. Smith who lives behind door 16. /Oscar Kokoshka moves in with Arnold when his wife, Susie, throws him out of their apartment following another fight.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S3 Ep. 44
programme.desc: Arnold seeks out his favorite author who turns out to be quite opposite of her sweet and sentimental books. / A rich kid joins Arnold's class. Arnold and the gang tell him what life in the big city is really like.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Arnold has trouble with the basketball coach and his favored son until he teaches them both a lesson in Zen as well as the meaning of teamwork./Arnold becomes friend with "cool" Frankie G., but his new friend only succeeds in getting him into trouble.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Helga's Love Potion/Gerald's Secret: Helga experiences a day free of her love/hate obsessionGerald reveals he can't ride a bike and Arnold helps him overcome his fear and humiliation.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 70
programme.desc: When Arnold and Grandpa get into a fender bender with Helga and Big Bob, the typical argument of who's at fault ensues. After a confrontation at PS 118 between Rhonda and Patty, they both end up at the same finishing school.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Birthday bashed/Momnipresent: Timmy is excited for his birthday until he realizes that one year older means one year closer to losing his fairies. He spends the entire day trying to thwart all party plans, leading his Mom and Dad to think he's gone crazy!

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Whittle Me This/Mayor May Not: Catman thinks Timmy has been kidnapped. He mistakes Chloe for Catgirl and enlists her help to save Timmy. Timmy wishes Dad was Mayor, but Timmy gets tortured by the paparazzi and risks having his fairies discovered.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Arnold and Gerald are invited to a school dance by Connie and Maria; a pair of 6th grade "older women"./Arnold and Gerald manage to scrape up enough money for cheap seats at the last baseball game of Mickey Kaline - Arnold's idol.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Sooper Poof: Poof is trying to get the hang of shape shifting – unfortunately he takes after Cosmo! Timmy’s been running Cosmo and Wanda ragged so Jorgen takes him to "Wishing Well."

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fairly OddPet: When Timmy realizes that everyone in Dimmsdale has a pet except him, he adopts Sparky, a mischievous fairy dog. But owning a fairy dog proves to be a much bigger challenge than Timmy could have ever predicted.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: The Beavers trick-or-treat the scary house on the hill. It turns out to be the home of their B-movie star hero, Oxnard Montalvo.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When Treeflower re-enters Norbert's life he expects their love to blossom once more.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The List/The Haunted Train: Arnold's best-laid plans for the "ultimate Saturday" go up in smoke when he tries to complete all of his favorite things to do in one afternoon./On a boring summer night Grandpa tries to liven things up by telling a story.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S10 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Clark Laser/Married to the Mom: When Timmy and Chloe save Dark Laser’s beloved pet, Flipsie, Dark Laser becomes bound to them as their bodyguard. Timmy and Chloe wish up a girlfriend for Mr. Crocker to get him off their backs.

programme.title: The Angry Beavers S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Norbert falls under the influence of slimy pond scum and becomes possessed by the spirit of un-goodliness.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S2 Ep. 32
programme.desc: The Longest Monday/Eugene's Pet: AKA - Trash Can Day, Arnold and Gerald must get through the traditional day of hazing 4th graders./After Eugene's pet fish is accidentally killed by Arnold's yo-yo, Arnold vows to get unlucky Eugene a pet that will endure.

programme.title: The Fairly Odd Parents S9 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Turner & Pooch/Dumbbell Curve: Crocker seeks out a new source of magic from Timmy’s house. Realizing it’s Sparky, Crocker tries to turn him against Timmy. Crocker grades on a bell curve so Timmy wishes everyone was dumber than him.

programme.title: Hey Arnold! S4 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Arnold goes all out to win Lila's affection by taking her to the Annual Cheese Festival. Harold feels that he has gotten too fat, so he gets his parents to send him on a weight-off cruise.
